prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至6184的强势表现、2026年小幅扩招约4%、本省物理类考生明显增加等因素，预计20 26年竞争略有加剧，位次在2025年基准上小幅后移；预测最低位次约6400名，区间6100–6700名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7523 → 8067 → 9081 → 11329 → 6184. In 2024, due to special types in the first batch of undergraduate B segment, it dropped to 20765, but the normal admission ranking for the first batch of undergraduate was 11329; in 2025, the first year of the new college entrance examination, the ranking rebounded significantly to 6184, indicating a clear recovery in application popularity; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 95 → 95 → 94 → 91 → 99, and the 2026 plan is 103, an increase of about 4% compared to 2025, with a relatively small expansion that has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 54th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, fluctuating between 48 and 55 in recent years, overall stable; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), with average Douyin popularity (ranked 98th overall), no significant record of admission gaps; overall attention is not high, with a neutral impact on application popularity; Materials Science and Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Transportation Engineering A-, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Materials, Mechanical, and Transportation, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's advantageous engineering directions; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 154,000, with an estimated 111,000 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 72%, a significant increase from 83,700 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the 2025 ranking rebounding to 6184, the small expansion of about 4% in 2026, and the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with the ranking slightly shifting backward from the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6400, with a range of 6100–6700.
